summary: Game/app project with animated character, tournament UI, and interactive boards. User is refining UI elements: enlarging 'Join Now For Tournament' text, adjusting the animated boy character size, and making boards smaller.
architectural_notes: Project includes animated character with dual-hand firing animation
UI contains tournament join section with text and decorative boards

existing_features.title: Enlarge and bold the 'Join Now For Tournament' button text. The element at XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/main[1]/section[1]/div[7]/div[2]/a[2]/span[4] should have a noticeably larger font size (e.g., increase by at least one to two size steps) and heavier font weight so the call-to-action label is more prominent.

Reduce the size of the animated shooting boy character in HeroSection. Scale down the SVG boy element (decrease its width/height or transform scale) so it occupies less vertical and horizontal space in the hero scene while keeping the animation intact.
Shrink the target board(s) in the HeroSection shooting animation. Reduce the width and height of the board SVG element(s) so they appear noticeably smaller within the scene.

new_feature_requests.summary: Make 'Join Now For Tournament' text larger/bolder
Resize animated boy character to be smaller
